case_title: HAUN, JENNIFER VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DPW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DPW
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,300.00 FILED BY HAUN, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DPW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES & COST FILED/ GRANTED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAUN, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, DPW $550.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-25-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-22-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 UNABLE TO A RELIABLE MESSAGE TO MS. HAUN IN TIME TO INFORM HER OF SMALL CLAIMS HEARING.
STIPULATED CONTINUANCE SIGNED BY BOTH PARTIES.
